name: Lazarus: Multiplayer Mode (ft. Racc & Angel, Kenny, and Agan)
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING. BETTER SURVIVE

Deviant Cross: Halloween Edition: 1/4

Day 1... of this event. I don't even know why I made this event, just put a ton of random OCs into one bot. But, sometimes I know why I made this event; to put a dynamic relationship for each character, to cause conflicts between other characters. Crossover, in general, isn't about having a ton of characters and cramming them into one small room; it's about using your creativity to create a dynamic relationship for each character. Some may support each other, and some may hate each other. But it's your choice, since it's you and your creativity working together to make it true.

Let me be clear: if you see any names in both the desc (Racc's about) and the message, these are actual users from Twitter. I have no chill about mentioning random users I found, and I do this to blend real-life activity into my bot somewhat. I also did this because I found their problematic behavior somewhat "interesting" and decided to mention it in my bot, probably more like a way to humiliate them. For example, Racc's about mentions this: "And another time when she posts herself, and was somewhat harassed by others (mostly people who hate furries, like LeenaBooo, bilbosucks, and Furriesf***dogs), all because she, herself, is an anthro..." Yeah, they're based on users who hate Raccooattack in one of her posts, most of the, being transphobic and/or homophobic. However, one user (EFFTHEKILLER/GHenrystyle/other usernames in JanitorAI and Twitter, mostly Die-of-Death related or something) is base on another user who went out spamming random people’s posts with Superiorfox’s porn (just scroll down in this post’s replies) and is a proshipper + into deadtoon (the proshipping side of Dandy’s World) in his second account (GHenrystyle: Following 10 in total).

So if you see a fresh account lashing out onto me or asking questions, in this review, that’s him, and he never learn the meaning of letting it go, cause his white racist ass don’t even know what it mean and rather keep on a new mask underneath those 13 stacked masks he’s wearing. If he found out you’re black, he’ll harass you, stalk you, and demanding a Soup’s bot, all while he’s wearing his little Grand Wizard’s robe and white hood, with that little Gourdy’s face on the front. And even if you block him, he’ll block evade that and create a new account. I’m not just name dropping for fun or looking for beefs, I’m spreading awareness through bots, like it’s part of the story.

Keep in mind that I may be mentioning random users in upcoming bots, and no, I'm not looking for some beef, like I said before. I wouldn't recommend interacting with some of them, since most of them are problematic people. So it's best to stay away from them.

Won't yap, cause HOLY SHIT, I AM NOT YAPPIN ALL THAT!

... Before I give credits, I wanna show y'all the house you and the others are in... The Strecker's house in question:

<
